response.notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Quality-safe rerun of the no-clone compile allreduce recipe with vLLM async scheduling disabled after a stricter six-prompt canary found NUL-token corruption in the async-scheduling path. Passed raw145 n256 exact token hash and six-prompt PASS/42/code/JSON/sort/SQL deterministic gate with no degenerate output. Mean of 2 p512/n1536 repeats: 62.66 output tok/s, 83.55 total tok/s. Total tok/s includes prompt plus decode; this vLLM bench mode does not emit isolated prefill tok/s. No speculative decoding, no expert drop, no model/quantization change, no power-limit change.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_NO_CLONE=1 VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=1 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 VLLM_XPU_FORCE_GRAPH_WITH_COMM=1 VLLM_XPU_GRAPH_NOOP_COMM_CAPTURE=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 VLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/mnt/fast-ai/vllm-cache-exp/minimax-reliability-pass-only vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --no-async-scheduling --block-size 256 --no-enable-prefix-caching --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 512 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --compilation-config '{"use_inductor_graph_partition":true,"compile_sizes":[1],"cudagraph_mode":"PIECEWISE"}'
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; B70 tuned MoE config E=256,N=384,dtype=int4_w4a16; llm-scaler u4 MoE decode path; VLLM_XPU_COMPILE_ALLREDUCE_NO_CLONE=1; --no-async-scheduling; async-scheduling enabled was rejected after six-prompt pack produced second-repeat token-id-0 NUL output; no power-limit change
